revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[Yukatchu]] **[[Ueekata]] **[[Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[Sessei]] *[[Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[Military of Ryukyu]] *[[Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[Kumemura]] *[[Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
|group5 = Dynasties |list5 = *[[First Shō dynasty]] *[[Second Shō dynasty]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Ryukyu Kingdom]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[Yukatchu]] **[[Ueekata]] **[[Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[Sessei]] *[[Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[Military of Ryukyu]] *[[Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[Kumemura]] *[[Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
|group5 = Dynasties |list5 = *[[First Shō dynasty]] *[[Second Shō dynasty]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Ryukyu Kingdom]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court Ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[Yukatchu]] **[[Ueekata]] **[[Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[Sessei]] *[[Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[Military of Ryukyu]] *[[Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[Kumemura]] *[[Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
|group5 = Dynasties |list5 = *[[First Shō dynasty]] *[[Second Shō dynasty]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Ryukyu Kingdom]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

{{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court Ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[Yukatchu]] **[[Ueekata]] **[[Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[Sessei]] *[[Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[Military of Ryukyu]] *[[Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[Kumemura]] *[[Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
|group5 = Dynasties |list5 = *[[First Shō dynasty]] *[[Second Shō dynasty]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Ryukyu Kingdom]] }}</noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[:en:King of Ryukyu|King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court Ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[:en:Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[Yukatchu]] **[[:en:Ueekata|Ueekata]] **[[:en:Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[:en:Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[:en:Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[Sessei]] *[[:en:Kikoe-ōgimi|Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[:en:Sanshikan|Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[:en:Military of Ryukyu|Military of Ryukyu]] *[[Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[:en:Kumemura|Kumemura]] *[[Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China|Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Edo|Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
|group5 = Dynasties |list5 = *[[:en:First Shō dynasty|First Shō dynasty]] *[[Second Shō dynasty]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Ryukyu Kingdom]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[:en:King of Ryukyu|King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court Ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[:en:Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[:en:Yukatchu|Yukatchu]] **[[:en:Ueekata|Ueekata]] **[[:en:Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[:en:Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[:en:Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[:en:Sessei|Sessei]] *[[:en:Kikoe-ōgimi|Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[:en:Sanshikan|Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[:en:Military of Ryukyu|Military of Ryukyu]] *[[:en:Ryūkyū-kan|Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[:en:Kumemura|Kumemura]] *[[:en:Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China|Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Edo|Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Joseon|Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
|group5 = Dynasties |list5 = *[[:en:First Shō dynasty|First Shō dynasty]] *[[:en:Second Shō dynasty|Second Shō dynasty]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Ryukyu Kingdom]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Government_of_the_Ryukyu_Kingdom here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Government_of_the_Ryukyu_Kingdom for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox |name = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |title = Government of the Ryukyu Kingdom |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image= [[File:Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom.svg|100px|Seal of the Ryukyu Kingdom|alt=]] |groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Royal family |list1 = *[[:en:King of Ryukyu|King of Ryukyu]] *[[Sashiki Ajiganashi]] (Queen Consort) *[[Prince of Nakagusuku]] (Crown Prince) *[[Nodake Ajiganashi]] (Crown Prince Consort)
|group2 = [[court Ranks of Ryukyu|Nobility]] |list2 = *[[Udun (Ryukyu)|Udun]] **[[:en:Aji (Ryukyu)|Aji]] *[[:en:Yukatchu|Yukatchu]] **[[:en:Ueekata|Ueekata]] **[[:en:Pechin|Pekumi]] **[[:en:Pechin|Satunushi Pechin]] **[[:en:Pechin|Chikudun Pechin]]
|group3 = Offices |list3 = *[[:en:Sessei|Sessei]] *[[:en:Kikoe-ōgimi|Kikoe-ōgimi]] **[[Noro (priestess)|Noro priestesses]]
|group4 = Institutions |list4 = *[[:en:Sanshikan|Sanshikan]] *[[Council of Fifteen]] *[[:en:Military of Ryukyu|Military of Ryukyu]] *[[:en:Ryūkyū-kan|Ryūkyū-kan]] *[[:en:Kumemura|Kumemura]] *[[:en:Tributary system of China|Tributary system]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China|Ryukyuan missions to Imperial China]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Edo|Ryukyuan missions to Edo]] **[[:en:Ryukyuan missions to Joseon|Ryukyuan missions to Joseon]]
